plugins.name: gainskeeper-operations
plugins.description: Exception research, gain/loss tie-out, transaction-log break triage, email/work-item intake routing, and field-status communication for prime-brokerage tax operations.

plugins.name: tax-data-analytics
plugins.description: Metric-movement diagnostics, data-quality profiling, KPI readouts, dashboard briefs, report writing, and the end-to-end break diagnostic workflow.

plugins.name: tax-ops-shared
plugins.description: Shared tax-ops domain knowledge (break taxonomy, routing rules, tax-form mappings) plus the validate/build/new-entry authoring commands.
